title: Roasted Garlic Delight
description: A simple yet flavorful roasted garlic dish perfect for accompanying any meal. It's easy to prepare and can be customized with your favorite herbs.
instructions: Cut the top off the garlic cloves and place them in a small baking dish.
Drizzle the olive oil over the garlic and season with salt and black pepper.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and roast for 20-25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue roasting for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the garlic is tender and caramelized.
Serve the roasted garlic hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
